caption: hey you, quick one about something from this week
yeah saw your note — got time tomorrow?
works for me, want to do 4pm?
4 is great, sending an invite
Ottoman panel 3 exit day. RH stabilized, warp relaxed, mount board on deck.
Reference library — Boone shelf complete. Pasztory next to it.
Studio dawn. The best hour to hear what a room actually is.
AIC Salt Lake — final morning. Two clear takeaways.
Panel 4 mount board — silk-satin, north edge finished.
Yoga after paper edit. Wrist range fully back.
Casa Oaxaca — arroz negro tonight, first on their menu.
New Silvana Estrada added to the bench focus playlist.
PEM sampler 22 — final photography. Object index closed.
Newsletter final review. Goes out Tuesday.
A quiet Sunday: mole batch, poetry, phone off.
Winterthur alumni panel outreach — draft sent.
Marcus at Oleana. He orders the same thing every time. I have opinions.
Studio playlist: Silvana, Coltrane, Frahm, Eno.
Reference photography set for panel 5 uploaded — 42 exposures.
Detail — vermilion silk crossing a diagonal warp.
Morning light on the panel 2 mount board. Ottoman, 17th c. Not a treatment shot — just how the studio holds a piece before it goes to case.
Ottoman panel 3 in humidification. Ten days is not a schedule, it is a promise.
Detail — vermilion silk crossing a diagonal warp. The wear tells its own history.
Reference set for panel 5. UV imaging, three angles.
Peabody Essex samplers, one through eight, waiting for the microscope hour.
Sunday batch cook: mole negro, session forty-seven. Still adjusting the piloncillo. Mama's palate remains ahead of mine.
Yoga at JP studio. Ten years and still learning how to keep the wrists neutral for microscope hours.
Jamaica Pond, foliage peak. Twenty-eight minutes today. Coffee first, poetry second.
Reference library — Boone and Pasztory shelved. Reading queue is officially unmanageable, in the best way.
Casa Oaxaca. Elote with cotija and lime. Cheat meal or a form of homework — you decide.
The bay window at dusk. Ocean Vuong in one hand, cafe de olla in the other. Studio door closed for the day.
Panel 6 dye samples in envelopes, labeled to accession number.
Detail from the Oaxacan private commission. Not condition; just the weave I get to sit inside for a season.
Panel 6 dye sampling — three colorants isolated. More to say another day.
Sofia's video card. She wants to embroider next visit. Basic running stitch first.
Panel 4 condition photography, north-light angle.
Panel 1 out of chamber — stable, no drift.
Ottoman brochure, tracked-changes pass. Committee copy landed clean.
Studio night light — LED sample panel from Waldmann on the left, existing fluorescent on the right. The difference matters.
New shipment from Talas: crepeline, hair silk, curved needles. The good ones.
Pond at 6:45 AM. Fog in the low spots. A day to keep everything close to the chest.
Playlist update — Silvana Estrada added to bench focus. Better than expected for microscope hours.
Charles River morning. Not part of the loop, just a detour.
Book club Saturday. Cisneros, again. I finished on the train back from Salem.
AIC Salt Lake City deck — 34 slides, alt-text pass done. Two rehearsals left.
Handmade shuttle from the Guatemalan vendor. Fits the palm. That's how you know it's right.
Late afternoon at the microscope. Panel 5, quadrant 3.
Yoga after the paper edit. Hip openers, no phone.
Studio door plants — the fig is finally putting out a new leaf. Small mercies.
Coffee: piloncillo, cinnamon, whole cardamom. The Sunday version.
Testfabrics reference swatches. Fourteen varieties, three that matter.
Panel 2 mount detail. Silk-satin covered board, hair-silk tacks, reversible.
PEM sampler 17. Linen ground more brittle than average. Switching to hair silk.
Reading queue update: Cisneros re-read, Vuong essay, Neruda thin volume.
Newsletter fall edition — draft one, no images yet.
Reference library shelf progress. Two new titles.
Aran, mesh, muslin. The starter kit for a student on their first week.
Panel 3 day-10 assessment scheduled. Coffee first.
Grant deadline in the shared drive — five weeks out. Still steady.
Sunday call moved to 3 PM. Mama is on new medication and I keep the light around it.
Panel 5 UV imaging session. Two fluorophores I didn't expect on the lower selvedge.
Yoga after paper draft. Wrist range fully back today, first time this week.
Cafe de olla at Tatte. Not their recipe, but a decent one.
Winterthur reference volume, ch. 4, marked up in the margins. Rare I write in a book.
Reading in the bay window — Neruda thin volume, dust-jacket removed.
Charles River detour. Not the loop. Just the fog.
Studio door — Waldmann sample panel installed. The wood grain reads truer than the fluorescent ever did.
Panel 3 chamber log. Twenty days in, one more inspection window.
Sunday mole batch, session 48. Roast the chile ancho longer, add the piloncillo earlier.
PEM sampler 20 — cochineal and iron gall, side by side.
Grant deadline countdown: four weeks. Still steady.
Reference library — Guatemalan weaving monograph shelved next to Boone.
Yoga instructor is back. Wednesday hip openers, no phone.
Rain at the pond. Twenty-three minutes today; boots regretted.
Ottoman brochure — copyedit pass v3. Comma-forward.
Coltrane, Resolution, on the studio speakers. Not a working sound. A remembering one.
Casa Oaxaca — mole poblano this week, not negro. Fair contest.
Rain, batch cook, poetry — the trifecta of a Sunday holding still.
Newsletter fall edition — two case studies, one mole note as the personal aside.
Marcus at the Blue Hills. Skyline loop, 7 AM start, back before 1.
Sofia's video card recorded. Thirty seconds, one take, no notes.
Priya on speakerphone during the dye analysis. Deep bench, quiet answers.
Studio dawn: cast light on the reference table, before the day fills in.
Sofia's video card in the mail today. Handwritten note tucked in the envelope.
Peabody Essex Salem — reading room, morning light, hand therapy stretches.
AIC hotel confirmation printed for backup. Old habits.
Reference library — shelf three complete. Ottoman embroidery corner up next.
Studio playlist: Silvana, Coltrane, Frahm, Eno, in that order for the whole afternoon.
Late text from Carmen — recipe for the mole. Fourth different version, all correct.
Panel 1 mount detail, corner tack close-up.
Priya's edits arrived overnight. Section 4 landed cleaner after her read.
Newsletter — final read pass. Newsletter goes out Tuesday.
PEM sampler 22 — final photography. Object index closed for the survey.
Elena at the studio. Coffee, panel 2, quiet twenty minutes. A better meeting than any Zoom.
Priya's Uber share meme after our 6 AM Salt Lake landing. Save that one for the retrospective.
Book club Saturday — Cisneros re-read, Vuong essay, Neruda thin volume, done.
AIC Q&A moderator role — cue sheet drafted, printed, tucked into the paper folder.
Casa Oaxaca — arroz negro tonight, first time on their menu.
Wednesday admin block — invoices out, supply orders in, three grant deadlines noted.
Panel 3 exit day. RH stabilized, warp relaxed, mount board on deck.
Sunday call — Mama, mole, weather, the same and never the same.
Reference library — Guatemalan weaving corner complete. Small shelf, deep thread.
